content.body:
runDoctor now prints an MRP v0 capability summary for each enabled
adapter — supported events and experimental events shown separately.
Tests cover both full-support (claude) and experimental (codex) cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(mrp): extend leo doctor with adapter capability section
